 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hzf","title":"Create root layout with providers (app/layout.tsx)","description":"**Details:**
- Root layout wrapping entire application
- Includes: ThemeProvider, ToastProvider, BasketProvider
- Sets up Geist fonts
- Includes metadata for SEO
- Includes SpotlightSearch (global Cmd+K)

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx
import { Geist, Geist_Mono } from 'next/font/google';
import { ThemeProvider } from '@/components/theme-provider';
import { ToastProvider } from '@/components/toast-provider';
import { BasketProvider } from '@/contexts/basket-context';
import { SpotlightSearch } from '@/components/spotlight-search';
import { Nav } from '@/components/nav';
import { Footer } from '@/components/footer';
import './globals.css';

const geistSans = Geist({ subsets: ['latin'], variable: '--font-geist-sans' });
const geistMono = Geist_Mono({ subsets: ['latin'], variable: '--font-geist-mono' });

export const metadata = {
  title: {
    default: 'Jeffrey\'s Prompts',
    template: '%s | Jeffrey\'s Prompts'
  },
  description: 'Curated prompts for agentic coding. Browse, copy, install as Claude Code skills.',
  metadataBase: new URL('https://jeffreysprompts.com'),
  openGraph: {
    title: 'Jeffrey\'s Prompts',
    description: 'Curated prompts for agentic coding',
    url: 'https://jeffreysprompts.com',
    siteName: 'JeffreysPrompts.com',
    type: 'website',
  },
  twitter: {
    card: 'summary_large_image',
    creator: '@doodlestein',
  },
};

export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <html lang='en' suppressHydrationWarning>
      <body className={`${geistSans.variable} ${geistMono.variable} font-sans antialiased`}>
        <ThemeProvider>
          <ToastProvider>
            <BasketProvider>
              <Nav />
              <main className='min-h-screen'>{children}</main>
              <Footer />
              <SpotlightSearch />
            </BasketProvider>
          </ToastProvider>
        </ThemeProvider>
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}
```

**Provider Order (outer to inner):**
1. ThemeProvider (affects all styling)
2. ToastProvider (toasts can appear anywhere)
3. BasketProvider (used by prompts throughout)

**Location:** apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx

**Reasoning:** Root layout establishes the foundation for the entire app. Providers must wrap in correct order for proper functionality. Global components (Nav, Footer, SpotlightSearch) should be included here.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:36:05.668478385-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:24:25.113425847-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:24:25.113425847-05:00","close_reason":"Completed as part of Next.js app and core package setup. Barrel exports, root layout, main page, and API routes are all functional.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hzf","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-vsk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:02.063567961-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hzf","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-4dx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:02.111898234-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hzf","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ixb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:02.138226362-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hzf","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-u36","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:02.164282467-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-iczz","title":"E2E Tests: Mobile Responsive Layouts","description":"## Origin
Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-oe5. Keep both repos in sync.

## Task
Create E2E tests for mobile responsive layouts and touch interactions.

## Test Scenarios

### Viewport Sizes
1. Mobile portrait (375px)
2. Mobile landscape (667px)
3. Tablet portrait (768px)
4. Tablet landscape (1024px)
5. Desktop (1280px+)

### Navigation
6. Hamburger menu on mobile
7. Menu opens/closes correctly
8. Sidebar collapses appropriately
9. Bottom nav (if applicable)
10. Sticky header behavior

### Content Layout
11. Cards stack on mobile
12. Tables scroll horizontally
13. Forms are full-width
14. Images scale correctly
15. Text is readable (16px min)

### Touch Interactions
16. Touch targets 44px minimum
17. Swipe gestures work
18. Long press menus work
19. Pull to refresh (if applicable)
20. No hover-only interactions

### Performance
21. LCP acceptable on 3G
22. No layout shift on load
23. Images lazy load
24. Smooth scrolling

## Files to Create
- e2e/mobile/viewports.spec.ts
- e2e/mobile/navigation.spec.ts
- e2e/mobile/touch.spec.ts
- e2e/lib/mobile-helpers.ts

## Success Criteria
- All viewports tested
- Touch interactions work
- Performance acceptable on mobile

## Logging Requirements
- Log viewport size for each run
- Record Core Web Vitals snapshots per page
- Capture screenshots for all viewports
","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:22:59.37668646-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T13:01:32.268465191-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-iczz","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-s5as","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:35.022931091-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-iij","title":"Implement skills manifest tracking for jfp update","description":"Part 6.5 of PLAN.
